function: () => { const panel = document.getElementById('draw-strength-panel'); const rect = panel.getBoundingClientRect(); window.scrollTo(0, window.scrollY + rect.top - 200); window.app._simulateDrawStrength({ connected: true, draw_strength_source: '/p/app/htr/air', draw_strength_percent: 100, draw_strength_active: true, draw_strength_mode: 'dynamic_inhale', heat: 'HEATING' }); return { panelY: rect.top, scrollY: window.scrollY, panelVisible: rect.top < window.innerHeight && rect.bottom > 0 }; }
